mapper.select: SELECT user_id, email, nickname, role, status, token_revoked_after, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_id, email, nickname, role, status, token_revoked_after, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_user WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user ( email, nickname, role, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{nickname}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT user_auth_id, user_id, auth_provider, provider_user_id, login_id, password_hash, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_user_auth WHERE auth_provider = #{authProvider} AND provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}

SELECT user_auth_id, user_id, auth_provider, provider_user_id, login_id, password_hash, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_user_auth WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND auth_provider = #{authProvider}

SELECT user_auth_id, user_id, auth_provider, provider_user_id, login_id, password_hash, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_user_auth WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND auth_provider = #{authProvider}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_auth ( user_id, auth_provider, provider_user_id, login_id, password_hash, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{authProvider}, #{providerUserId}, #{loginId}, #{passwordHash}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user_auth SET last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_auth_id = #{userAuthId}

UPDATE tb_user SET email = #{anonymizedEmail}, nickname = 'withdrawn_user', status = 'WITHDRAWN', withdrawn_at = NOW(), withdraw_reason_cd = #{withdrawReasonCd}, withdraw_reason_text = #{withdrawReasonText}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE tb_user SET token_revoked_after = #{tokenRevokedAfter}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
